name: Business First Bancshares, Inc.
business: Business First Bancshares, Inc. is a financial holding company and parent of b1BANK, a community-based financial institution offering a full array of banking products and services including loans, deposits, and wealth management. It primarily serves small-to-midsized businesses, their owners and employees, as well as high net worth individuals in Louisiana, the Dallas/Fort Worth metroplex, and Houston.

exposures.sentence: market declines in industries to which we have exposure, such as the volatility in energy prices and downturns in the energy industry that impact certain of our borrowers and investments that operate within, or are backed by collateral associated with, the energy industry;

We also offer various consumer loans to individuals and professionals including residential real estate loans, home equity loans, installment loans, unsecured and secured personal lines of credit, and standby letters of credit.

increased competition in the financial services industry, particularly from regional and national institutions and emerging non-bank competitors;

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Waterstone LSP, LLC completed
catalysts.sentence: On January 31, 2024, we completed the acquisition, through b1BANK, of Waterstone, headquartered in Katy, Texas.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Oakwood Bancshares, Inc. completed
catalysts.sentence: On October 1, 2024, we consummated the merger of Oakwood, the parent bank holding company for Oakwood Bank, with and into Business First, with Business First continuing as the surviving corporation pursuant to the terms of that certain Agreement and Plan of Reorganization (the "Oakwood Reorganization Agreement"), dated April 25, 2024, by and between Business First and Oakwood.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Progressive Bancorp, Inc. completed
catalysts.sentence: On January 1, 2026, we consummated the merger of Progressive, the parent bank holding company for Progressive Bank, with and into Business First, with Business First continuing as the surviving corporation pursuant to the terms of that certain Agreement and Plan of Reorganization (the "Progressive Reorganization Agreement"), dated July 7, 2025, by and between Business First and Progressive.
